nasb.text: But Jezebel his wife came to him and said to him, “How is it that your spirit is so sullen that you are not eating food?”

esv.text: But Jezebel his wife came to him and said to him, “Why is your spirit so vexed that you eat no food?”

cnv.text: 他的妻子耶洗別進來見他，問他說：“你為甚麼心裡這麼煩悶，連飯也不吃呢？”

ccb.text: 他妻子耶洗别过来问他：“王为什么烦闷，不思饮食呢？”
